summary: Iteration 25 - Debounce Logic Testing COMPLETE. All 14 backend tests PASSED (14/14). All 5 debounce unit tests PASSED. Frontend verified: document.title='DartsKiosk', locked screen shows 'GESPERRT'. Release package rebuilt with debounce changes VERIFIED.
passed_tests: CODE: Entering in_game is immediate (no debounce)
CODE: Exiting in_game requires consecutive confirmation polls
Full lifecycle: unlock(2) → start → finish (stays unlocked, 1 credit) → start → abort (auto-lock, 0 credits)
FRONTEND: Locked screen renders 'GESPERRT' with pricing info
FRONTEND: data-testid elements present (locked-screen, pricing-info, pairing-code-display)
RELEASE: Package rebuilt with debounce changes (DEBOUNCE_EXIT_POLLS=3, DEBOUNCE_POLL_INTERVAL=2)
seed_data_creation: Full lifecycle test created: 2-credit session for lifecycle testing. Board locked after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 verified the NEW DEBOUNCE logic that prevents false exits from in_game during turn changes. KEY IMPLEMENTATION: 1) DEBOUNCE_EXIT_POLLS=3 (env: OBSERVER_DEBOUNCE_POLLS) - requires 3 consecutive non-in_game polls before confirming exit. 2) DEBOUNCE_POLL_INTERVAL=2s (env: OBSERVER_DEBOUNCE_INTERVAL) - polls faster during debounce confirmation. 3) Total debounce time: 3×2=6 seconds protects against brief DOM flickers during turn changes. 4) Entering in_game is IMMEDIATE (no debounce) - credit consumed promptly. 5) RECOVERED pattern logs when observer recovers to in_game during debounce. Unit tests cover: turn change recovery, real abort, real finish, alternating flicker resilience. All tests PASS.

debounce_logic.entry_behavior: Immediate (no debounce) - credit consumed on first in_game detection
debounce_logic.exit_behavior: Requires 3 consecutive non-in_game polls before confirming exit
debounce_logic.recovery_pattern: RECOVERED log when in_game returns during confirmation phase
debounce_logic.exit_reason_tracking: _exit_saw_finished tracks if any poll returned FINISHED

release_package.verified: DEBOUNCE_EXIT_POLLS and DEBOUNCE_POLL_INTERVAL present in packaged autodarts_observer.py

debounce_fix_summary.problem: Board was locking during normal gameplay turn changes because observer treated brief DOM changes during turn transitions as finished/aborted
debounce_fix_summary.fix: Added debounce logic - exiting in_game now requires 3 consecutive non-in_game polls at 2s intervals (total 6s). A single brief flicker during turn change gets recovered before reaching the threshold.
debounce_fix_summary.behavior_preserved: Entering in_game is still immediate (credit consumed promptly when match starts)
